reviews.comment:
Hermoso y nuevo lugar! Los baños impecables, la NAFTA a buen precio, y el playero de las tres de la tarde, un encanto. Pasamos hoy, y nos indicó como llegar a la plaza del pueblo, de manera cordial y exacta.

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful new place! The bathrooms are spotless, NAFTA is reasonably priced, and the 3 p.m. beachcomber is a delight. We stopped by today, and he gave us friendly and precise directions to the town square.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURwX3VDSDFBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Si van hacia tafi del valle última ypf para cargar xq Santa maria y San José no hay buenas estaciones de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
If you are going towards Tafi del Valle, last YPF to fill up because Santa Maria and San José do not have good service stations.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención del personal. La limpieza de los baños muy buena.
Lo malo no dispone de full. No se puede desayunar ni merendar ni comer

(Translated by Google)
Excellent staff service. The bathrooms are very clean.
The only downside is that it's not fully booked. Breakfast, afternoon snacks, and lunch aren't available.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12873177461588192703/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKc2RYTThnRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful place, going along Highway 40, you have to take a detour, if it weren't for the fact that we were filling up with gas we wouldn't have seen it
